arts.ttl: Thomas Müller gives cryptic answers about Bayern Munich’s Uli Hoeness’ statements
arts.sum: Per @iMiaSanMia, when asked about the statements, Müller wished to not provide a clear answer. When asked about Hoeness’ statements on Müller being unprepared and surprised by the club’s decision, he replied that he could neither confirm nor deny those statements.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern almost signed Schwabe over Urbig
arts.sum: Die Rekordmeister came close to making a move for the experienced 29-year-old shot-stopper over the young prodigy Urbig.

arts.ttl: Inter hopes to show Bayern what real celebrations look like in Champions League quarterfinals
arts.sum: If Inter advances Wednesday after the second leg at San Siro, Kane and Kompany will get to see what those celebrations really look like. Harry Kane accused Inter Milan players of celebrating “like they won the tie” after the Nerazzurri’s surprise first-leg victory over Bayern Munich in the Champions League quarterfinals last week.

arts.sum: Bayern Munich are reportedly contemplating whether to make an approach for an Aston Villa star man during the summer transfer window.
